scripts.build: prisma generate && npm --prefix .. run build --workspace @asiamath/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.dev: npm --prefix .. run build --workspace @asiamath/shared && prisma migrate deploy && nodemon --watch src --watch ../packages/shared/src --ext ts,json --exec "npm --prefix .. run build --workspace @asiamath/shared && ts-node src/index.ts"
scripts.test: npm --prefix .. run build --workspace @asiamath/shared && sh -c 'DATABASE_URL="$TEST_DATABASE_URL" prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed && DATABASE_URL="$TEST_DATABASE_URL" jest --runInBand'
